title: Add doc comment to RunOutput.WrapupAgentStep
description:
The WrapupAgentStep method in internal/output/output.go (added by j32) is missing a doc comment. Add a standard Go doc comment explaining the method's purpose and parameters.

Files: internal/output/output.go
closed_reason: Added comprehensive Go doc comment to RunOutput.WrapupAgentStep explaining the method's purpose (progress reporting and board event broadcasting) and documenting all four parameters (index, total, title, status) with examples.
